category.scope_note: Corded and cordless electric power tools, chargers, battery packs, EMC, market access, labelling, noise, and substance/battery topics for China export comparison.

title.en: China-to-Georgia Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入格鲁吉亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入格魯吉亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Informational comparison of common China power-tool compliance evidence against Georgia GeoSTM market access, national safety and EMC certification, labelling, battery, substances, and workplace-noise expectations.
description.zh: 中国电动工具常见合规证据与格鲁吉亚 GeoSTM 市场准入、国家安全与 EMC 认证、标签、电池、物质及职业噪声要求的信息性对照。
description.zht: 中國電動工具常見合規證據與格魯吉亞 GeoSTM 市場准入、國家安全與 EMC 認證、標籤、電池、物質及職業噪聲要求的資訊性對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Georgia is not an EAEU member; exporters and importers should verify current GeoSTM standards, conformity assessment, GNCC radio rules, customs practice, and Georgian-language labelling expectations with qualified local professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。格鲁吉亚不是欧亚经济联盟成员；出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格的当地专业人士核验现行 GeoSTM 标准、合格评定、GNCC 无线电规则、海关实践及格鲁吉亚语标签要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。格魯吉亞不是歐亞經濟聯盟成員；出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格的當地專業人士核驗現行 GeoSTM 標準、合格評定、GNCC 無線電規則、海關實務及格魯吉亞語標籤要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made corded or cordless power tools entering Georgia, treat the route as national GeoSTM conformity assessment using Georgian GOST IEC adoptions of IEC 60745/62841, EMC evidence, Georgian-language labelling, and battery safety evidence for cordless tools. Do not use EAEU TR CU as the target route, and do not invent a fully in-force horizontal RoHS or EU outdoor-noise regime for Georgia.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入格鲁吉亚，应按国家 GeoSTM 合格评定路径处理，使用格鲁吉亚采纳的 GOST IEC 60745/62841、EMC 证据、格鲁吉亚语标签，以及无绳工具的电池安全证据。不要把 EAEU TR CU 作为目标路径，也不要虚构格鲁吉亚已有全面生效的横向 RoHS 或欧盟户外噪声制度。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入格魯吉亞，應按國家 GeoSTM 合格評定路徑處理，使用格魯吉亞採納的 GOST IEC 60745/62841、EMC 證據、格魯吉亞語標籤，以及無繩工具的電池安全證據。不要把 EAEU TR CU 作為目標路徑，也不要虛構格魯吉亞已有全面生效的橫向 RoHS 或歐盟戶外噪聲制度。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Review before publication and whenever GeoSTM, GNCC, or Georgia EU-approximation rules change.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must remain source-linked, mark verified false until human-reviewed, and must not copy EU regulatory obligations into Georgia unless they are confirmed in force in Georgia.
